stepEntry.title: Install the package
stepEntry.instruction: Add the UI package to your project with your package manager.

items.title: Install the package
items.instruction: Add the UI package to your project.

items.title: Wrap your app in the provider
items.instruction: Mount the `ThemeProvider` at the root of your application so every component inherits the theme.
items.expectedResult: Components render with Acme's default light theme.

items.title: Enable dark mode
items.instruction: Pass the `dark` scheme to the provider to opt into the dark theme.
